message:
perf(ftui-runtime): add #[inline] to trivial accessors (bd-1kxmu)

Add #[inline] to 18 trivial accessor methods for cross-crate inlining:
- simulator.rs: model, model_mut, is_running, tick_rate, logs, command_log
- wasm_runner.rs: model, model_mut, drain_logs, logs, current_buffer
- input_macro.rs: metadata, len, is_empty, total_duration
- string_model.rs: new, inner, inner_mut, into_inner
- terminal_writer.rs: width, height, screen_mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
